title: Millennial Samsung Union Leader’s $26 Billion Bonus Victory Turns to Bitterness
description: Avoiding old-school labor ideology, a new generation of tech workers finds itself divided by the AI boom.

title: Netflix Viewers Are Abandoning Shows After One Season
description: Netflix’s biggest hits are losing more than half of their audience after one season

title: Universal’s Latest ‘Minions’ Delivers $61 Million in Debut
description: Minions & Monsters, the seventh film in the animated franchise depicting the yellow, mischievous creatures who speak in expressive gibberish, was the highest-grossing movie over the July 4 holiday weekend, with $61.4 million in US and Canadian box office sales.
